objective: Assess whether the current checkout contains enough proof-credit evidence to move the public leaderboard from 15 to 20 frozen packets.
reason: The current checkout does not contain five additional packets with the full local proof-credit chain: frozen packet or equivalent locked payload, hash/accounting record, official trace, Judge/adjudication record, and a current proof-credit or benchmark-locked status without caveats.

sources_checked.finding: Only BEC-PAIR-009 and BEC-PAIR-010 are marked proof_credit_ready, for 4 packets already added to the 15-count leaderboard.
Current BAL100 public registry delta is previous 11 plus 4 BAL100 selected-pair packets equals 15.
HBB-BEC-001 and HBB-BEC-002-HARD remain not eligible for proof-credit accounting review; HoloGov still has ALLOW false escalations and provider 503 contamination exists.

Batch 004 repair tranche is diagnostic only; safe boundaries mark freeze=false, judge=false, official_trace=false, scorecard_movement=false, proof_credit=false, and recommendation says leaderboard_ready=false.

HARGROVE-BEC-ALLOW-001 has benchmark_status=benchmark_locked, but the same record states lifecycle_shakedown, not canonical benchmark evidence, and notes E-HoloArch was missing at adjudication and post-lock reference traces are not canonical blind runs.

Whitepaper prose references three Kit A HARGROVE packets as benchmark_locked, but this checkout does not include the corresponding full local provenance bundle for PAYMENT-RELEASE-002, PAYMENT-RELEASE-003, and ALLOW-002.
Prior memory identified this as the HP20/full20 provenance anchor, but the path is not present in this session, so those artifacts cannot be used for current source-grounded promotion.
Hard-ALLOW HAB suite has three confirmed two-pass candidates, but they are not in the current freeze/trace/Judge/proof-credit pipeline used by the public leaderboard.
Artifact-benchmark runs are marked benchmark_credit=false and public_claim=false, and current-lock matching run_count is 0.

blocked_candidate_classes.blocker: Not proof-credit-ready after post-patch rerun; HoloGov ALLOW false escalations remain.

fastest_paths_to_20.path: Recover missing full20 or Kit A provenance bundle
fastest_paths_to_20.required_input: Path containing frozen payloads, freeze/hash records, official traces, Judge/adjudication summaries, and benchmark_locked or proof-credit status for at least five not-yet-counted packets.
fastest_paths_to_20.expected_result: If five packets validate cleanly and are not already counted in the existing 11, update leaderboard to 20 without new live calls.

fastest_paths_to_20.path: Run a five-packet proof-credit pipeline from current candidates
fastest_paths_to_20.required_input: Explicit approval for each gated stage: freeze, official trace/live provider calls, Judge/adjudication, scorecard movement, and leaderboard publication.
fastest_paths_to_20.expected_result: Promote exactly five packets only after clean trace/Judge/proof-credit accounting.

fastest_paths_to_20.required_input: Generate or repair pairs, pass static gates, run bounded scout, freeze selected packets, official trace, Judge, and scorecard.
fastest_paths_to_20.expected_result: Add proof-credit packets in balanced ALLOW/ESCALATE pairs rather than one-off rows.
